title: ipomoea obscura var. indica
intro: Ipomoea obscura var. indica, also known as the Indian morning glory or Ipomoea indica, is a plant species belonging to the Convolvulaceae family. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The plant has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. Ipomoea indica can be prepared as a herbal remedy in various forms, such as a decoction, infusion, or powder, and is often used to treat a range of health conditions, from digestive issues to skin problems.
